commands.review_summary:
The PR makes experimental `localModelLean` runs synthesize Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, threads that effective config through embedded runner tool catalogs, and updates focused tests and local-model docs.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +85, Docs +2. Total +122 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes an experimental default behavior rather than reproducing a reported current-main bug. Source inspection and focused tests show the new branch and opt-out behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR plus a compatibility-sensitive experimental default change needs maintainer acceptance rather than an automated repair job.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- Defaults `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when `tools.toolSearch` is not explicitly configured.
- Preserves explicit operator Tool Search config, including the `tools.toolSearch: false` opt-out.
- Threads the lean effective config into embedded runner Tool Search setup and documents the behavior for local model/Ollama users.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed on pushed SHA `0d5847f137d`: 2 routed Vitest shards, 65 tests, 21.31s.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed after rebasing onto `723b5085d93`.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with exit 0 on SHA `103dce39270` rebased on `7de025eacd8`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_5907207974df`, run `run_4023db9237cf`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `docs`.
- Earlier AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` also passed with exit 0 on SHA `db5d28d6122` rebased on `0fdc51f35d`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_fe6af09df8fe`, run `run_012938bb6e25`.
- Live Ollama Cloud source-level stream probe with structured Tool Search control tools passed for `gemma3:12b`, `rnj-1:8b`, and `gpt-oss:20b`; each payload contained `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, `tool_call`, `think: false`, `num_ctx: 4096`, and returned `OK`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` previously passed clean: no accepted/actionable findings; overall patch-correctness score 0.84.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: local-model lean runs now compact larger tool catalogs behind structured Tool Search controls by default, reducing prompt/tool schema pressure for smaller models while preserving explicit operator config.

Real environment tested: local macOS node-wrapper Vitest/static checks; Ollama Cloud live stream probes with hosted small models; AWS Crabbox Linux c7a.8xlarge changed gates.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot`; AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` in runs `run_4023db9237cf` and `run_012938bb6e25`; `node --import tsx` source-level Ollama Cloud stream probe using `extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests pass on pushed SHA `0d5847f137d`; Crabbox changed gate passed on the same 7-file patch after current-main rebases with lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`; live Ollama probes accepted the structured `tool_search` / `tool_describe` / `tool_call` surface and returned `OK`.

Observed result after fix: lean mode injects `{ enabled: true, mode: "tools", searchDefaultLimit: 5, maxSearchLimit: 10 }` only when Tool Search is unset; explicit `tools.toolSearch` config remains untouched; hosted Ollama models accept the resulting structured control-tool surface.

What was not tested: no full end-to-end chat/channel agent turn with a live local Ollama daemon in this PR; this PR proves embedded runner config behavior, hosted Ollama structured-control compatibility, and changed-gate coverage. `origin/main` moved again after the final local sanity pass, so I did not repeatedly burn another remote gate after the already-green Crabbox runs.
target.author: vincentkoc
